evidence: Clear public API names: Monitor, Signal, Memory, Swarm, Autoresearch
Descriptive method names: scan(), vote(), should_trade(), top_conditions()
Improved internal variable naming: file_path instead of p, win_rate instead of wr
Simplified price normalization with clear comments explaining Kalshi API format
Type annotations on all public functions
Consistent use of from __future__ import annotations
Input types use dict[str, Any] throughout
Type hints on all public functions
Consistent log-and-degrade pattern in monitor and autoresearch
Clean swarm agent hierarchy with base class
No dead code remaining after cleanup
Clean calculation paths without redundant computations
Clear module responsibilities and single responsibility per module
Well-structured Autoresearch.run() with clear wave logic
Clean Swarm.vote() with concise agent delegation
No dead code or unused variables after cleanup
Clean dollar calculation with clear comments
Simplified backtest loop without unused ewma_edge
Clean module separation with clear responsibilities
Module-level constants are simple immutable values
Consistent pipe syntax for optional types after fix
Uniform dataclass usage for result types
Only requests and numpy as external dependencies
Tests for all major modules: backtest, config, memory, swarm, monitor
Good use of pytest fixtures and clear test naming
Clean separation of public and private APIs
Flat package structure appropriate for codebase size

naming_quality.dimension_character: Public API names are clear and domain-appropriate. Internal variable names have been improved with expanded names where previously abbreviated.
naming_quality.score_rationale: Good naming throughout. Public API names clearly communicate intent. Some internal abbreviations remain (cat for category in loops) but are contextually clear.

logic_clarity.dimension_character: Clear logic flow in all modules. Price normalization simplified with clear comments explaining the Kalshi API format.
logic_clarity.score_rationale: Good logic clarity. The price normalization was simplified from a fragile heuristic to a clean division with explanatory comments. Early-return patterns are consistent.

type_safety.dimension_character: Well-typed outputs via dataclasses. Input types use dict[str, Any] throughout. All public functions have type annotations.
type_safety.score_rationale: Asymmetry between well-typed outputs and loosely typed inputs. Acceptable for package size but limits static analysis value.

contract_coherence.dimension_character: Type hints present on all functions. Output types well-defined via dataclasses. Input contracts rely on docstrings.
contract_coherence.score_rationale: Well-typed outputs but input contracts enforced only by documentation. Acceptable for a small package.

error_consistency.dimension_character: Consistent graceful degradation pattern. Error handling follows log-and-degrade pattern where present.
error_consistency.score_rationale: Consistent error handling patterns. setup.py encoding fixed. Appropriate error coverage for package size.

abstraction_fitness.dimension_character: Well-chosen abstractions with extracted helper for duplicated logic. Swarm agent pattern and memory hierarchy are clean.
abstraction_fitness.score_rationale: Good abstraction level after extracting _classify_implied_bucket. Dataclass usage is appropriate throughout.

ai_generated_debt.dimension_character: AI-generated code patterns have been cleaned up. No dead calculations, unused variables, or orphaned imports remain.
ai_generated_debt.score_rationale: Previous AI-generation artifacts have all been removed. Code is clean with no remaining dead code patterns.

high_level_elegance.dimension_character: Clear conceptual flow with clean interfaces. Each module has single responsibility.
high_level_elegance.score_rationale: Good organization with clean dataclass result types. Dollar calculation simplified to single clear computation.

mid_level_elegance.dimension_character: Functions are well-structured with clear flows. Filter logic cleaned up with consistent indexing.
mid_level_elegance.score_rationale: Clean function structure throughout. _passes_filter simplified. Good use of early returns.

low_level_elegance.dimension_character: Clean low-level code after removal of dead calculations. No unused imports or variables.
low_level_elegance.score_rationale: Dead code cleaned up. Code is now clean with no remaining craft issues.

cross_module_architecture.dimension_character: Small flat module structure with clear separation. Dependencies flow unidirectionally without cycles.
cross_module_architecture.score_rationale: Clean module boundaries with no cycles. Good for package size.

initialization_coupling.dimension_character: Clean initialization patterns. No import-time side effects, no global mutable state.
initialization_coupling.score_rationale: No coupling concerns at import time. Standard patterns throughout.

convention_outlier.dimension_character: Consistent conventions throughout. All modules use __future__ annotations and modern pipe syntax.
convention_outlier.score_rationale: Good consistency after fixing Optional vs pipe syntax inconsistency.

dependency_health.dimension_character: Minimal, well-chosen dependencies. Only requests and numpy.
dependency_health.score_rationale: Clean dependency profile with only two essential external dependencies.

test_strategy.dimension_character: Good test coverage across all major modules with 33 tests across 5 test files.
test_strategy.score_rationale: Tests cover all major modules with good scenario coverage. Network-dependent code appropriately excluded.

api_surface_coherence.dimension_character: Well-defined public API with explicit __all__ exports and consistent patterns.
api_surface_coherence.score_rationale: Clean exports with consistent class+result dataclass pairs.

authorization_consistency.dimension_character: Uses only public unauthenticated Kalshi API endpoints. No auth logic needed.
authorization_consistency.score_rationale: N/A dimension - correctly uses only public APIs.

incomplete_migration.dimension_character: No incomplete migrations. Codebase in consistent state.
incomplete_migration.score_rationale: Clean - no stalled or incomplete migrations.

package_organization.dimension_character: Well-organized flat package structure appropriate for size.
package_organization.score_rationale: Good organization with clean separation of source, tests, and examples.

design_coherence.dimension_character: Clear design vision with configurable paths and consistent result patterns.
design_coherence.score_rationale: Good coherence after making output path configurable. Consistent patterns across modules.

add.description: Class and method names map directly to trading domain concepts.
All modules at package root with clean dependency direction.
Only requests and numpy - both essential.
Library uses only unauthenticated Kalshi public endpoints.
